_comment: Source of truth for which sub-agents the Lumo shell loads. Each agent must expose /.well-known/agent.json + /openapi.json + health_url. Keep this file small and boring — config drift is the enemy.

agents._notes: Lumo-Food-Agent. Local dev port 3001. In prod set LUMO_REGISTRY_PATH to a prod-specific file or use env-overlay at CI time.
Lumo-Flight-Agent (new repo). Duffel-backed. Local dev port 3002.
Lumo-Restaurant-Agent (new repo). OpenTable mock-first — partner API is gated, stub handles the whole reservation loop until OPENTABLE_PARTNER_ID+OPENTABLE_API_KEY are set. Local dev port 3003.

Lumo-Hotel-Agent (new repo). Amadeus Self-Service mock-first — test.api.amadeus.com is self-serve so no partner gating, but we scaffold against the in-memory catalog first to keep orchestrator work unblocked. Flip to real once AMADEUS_CLIENT_ID+AMADEUS_CLIENT_SECRET are wired. Local dev port 3004.
Lumo Open Weather Agent. Open-Meteo forecasts globally and NWS alerts for US coordinates. Local dev port 3005.
Lumo Open Maps Agent. Nominatim geocoding and OSRM driving route/matrix estimates. Local dev port 3006.
Lumo Open EV Charging Agent. Open Charge Map charger discovery; requires OPENCHARGEMAP_API_KEY for tool calls. Local dev port 3007.
Lumo Open Events Agent. Wikidata no-key event discovery with optional Ticketmaster Discovery API key. Local dev port 3008.
Lumo Open Attractions Agent. Nominatim autosuggest and Overpass attraction discovery. Local dev port 3009.
